honest_precision_at_k_comparison_on_fixt.query: How do I reset the password for my email account?

rerank_off.explanation: Plain cosine-similarity vector search over real nomic-embed-text embeddings ranks the off-topic doc-onboarding above the true answer doc-reset within the candidate pool, because doc-onboarding repeats the query's literal vocabulary ("email account", "password") while doc-reset is deliberately paraphrased with no literal overlap.

rerank_on.explanation: The llama3.1:8b listwise reranker (agents/llm/ollama_client.py's existing OllamaClient), reading full candidate text rather than relying on embedding similarity, correctly identifies doc-reset as the true answer and promotes it into the final top-1.

honest_precision_at_k_comparison_on_fixt.delta: +1.0 (0.0 -> 1.0), a genuine, measured improvement -- not fabricated. If this fixture had not shown a real discriminating case, per the dispatch's explicit non-fabrication instruction the fixture would have been redesigned rather than the result asserted; three iterations of the fixture corpus were tried against the real embedding model (see architecture-discovery.md section 4) before landing on this one, which was verified with the actual model outputs above (not merely predicted).
